name: Google AI Agent Orchestration
description: Orchestrates multi-tenant AI agents with lead capture and product display capabilities.

functionDeclaration.name: captureLead
functionDeclaration.description: Collects lead contact information for a callback.

functionDeclaration.name: showProducts
functionDeclaration.description: Displays specific products to the user.

promptBlocks: You have access to lead capture tools to help users get in touch with specialists.
You can also display products directly if the user expresses interest in specific items.
